channel.title: Book Review on
channel.description: Recent content in Book Review on

item.title: Breakfast Smoothies
item.description: Vacation Thoughts on The Hard Thing About Hard Things I recently finished The Hard Thing About Hard Things by Ben Horowitz while sipping smoothies (okay, piña coladas) on a sunny beach in Cancun. Let me tell you—reading about layoffs, crisis management, and the emotional toll of leadership while surrounded by palm trees is a bit of a vibe clash. But somehow, it worked. Horowitz doesn’t sugarcoat anything. This isn’t your typical feel-good business book with vague buzzwords and “manifest your success” nonsense.
